sourceLabel: Town of Pittsford Town Court contact page
notes: Web confirms (585) 248-6238 as Pittsford Town Court Court Clerk line. ADDRESS CORRECTION: programs.js had stale 11 South Main St; Pittsford Town Court is at 3750 Monroe Ave (Town Hall is 11 S Main but court is at Monroe Ave). Court in session every Thursday.

sourceLabel: Town of Pittsford Assessor's Office page
notes: Web confirms (585) 248-6230 as Pittsford Assessor's Office line. 11 South Main St. M-F 8am-4pm.

sourceLabel: Town of Pittsford DPW Building & Code Enforcement page
notes: Web confirms (585) 248-6265 as Pittsford Building and Code Enforcement line. DPW main: 585-248-6250. M-F 8am-4pm.

Web confirms (585) 264-9860 as Pittsford Food Cupboard line. 3800 Monroe Ave Suite 26. Tu/F 9:30-1:30, 1st/3rd Sat 9:30-11:30. Serves Pittsford+Mendon+HF+Brighton+East Rochester (4,000+ households/year).
Web confirms (585) 248-6275 as Pittsford Community Library main line. 24 State St.

sourceLabel: Town of Pittsford Senior Citizens page
notes: Web confirms (585) 248-6235 as Pittsford Seniors office line. 35 Lincoln Ave (Spiegel Pittsford Community Center). Lunch Club 60 reservations one week ahead. Elderberry Express transport: 585-248-6237.

Web confirms (585) 264-0604 as Pittsford Youth Services line. 4 South Main St (Phoenix Building). Counseling sliding scale from $75/hour. M-F 10am-2pm + after-school/evening appts.

sourceLabel: Town of Rush Town Clerk and Building Department pages
